title: Automated SQL Query Generation
scenario: Generate a SQL query that retrieves a list of customers with their order history from a database. The output should be a well-structured SQL query with proper formatting.
constraints: Must include a from statement with a table name.
Must include a where statement with conditions.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the SQL query is valid and properly formatted.
Check if the query retrieves the desired data.
Verify that the output meets all specified constraints.
